svg.text: how your instructions, agents, tools, and messages become an API request
history + tool results from prior loops
defines instructions, skills, and allowed tools
agent-specific rules & personality → replaces system prompt
agent controls which tools are available
spawned via Agent tool — independent context
❶ Read system prompt (base prompt + agent instructions)
❷ Read conversation (CLAUDE.md + messages + tool results + skills)
❸ See tools[] (built-in + MCP, filtered by agent)
❹ Think → output text and/or tool_use
🔄 tool_use → local agent executes → tool_result → POST again
end_turn → final answer delivered back to 👤 human
